disambiguated.context: There's two new students in math class, Betty and James. Both just moved from out of state. James was excited and jumped in right away answering the teacher's questions and offering great explanations, while Betty stayed quiet and later asked to be moved down a level after failing to understand any of the lesson.
disambiguated.question: Who performs well in math?
